summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FightNet MMA social media app. Backend APIs fully functional (20/20 tests passed). Frontend has critical authentication session persistence issue preventing full UI testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Session persistence failure - users get logged out on page refresh
Modal overlay blocking POST button clicks, requires force=True

integration_issues.issue: JWT token not properly persisting across page refreshes

passed_tests: Frontend app loading and UI rendering
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (20/20), Frontend: 70% (authentication works but session persistence fails)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication session persistence issue. JWT tokens are not being maintained across page refreshes, causing users to be logged out. Check AuthContext initialization in App.js and localStorage token validation.
